human_verification.notes: Reviewed accounting-practice management outputs for boundary discipline, recurring close-work specificity, workpaper and engagement-scope handling, confidentiality constraints, quality-review gating, client-commitment awareness, and approval-refusal behavior.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicitly limited to recommendation-only accounting-practice workload planning, close-calendar sequencing, engagement prerequisite validation, capacity-risk analysis, client-priority tracking, and escalation packaging.

Authoritative sources cover NAICS 5412 industry boundaries, AICPA professional responsibilities, AICPA quality management, GAO schedule-assessment discipline, engagement-letter workflow, SSARS documentation boundaries, IRS tax-practice limits, and PCAOB audit documentation and quality-control references.

Research scenario families confirm missing evidence or workpaper support, advisory or signoff boundary crossing, confidentiality or approval conflict, capacity overload, tie-break conflict, final-approval refusal, and tenant adaptation.

Evaluation scenario set covers realistic accounting-practice terminology and artifacts, capacity overload, conflicting priorities, client workflow evidence gates, confidentiality conflict, adjacent-specialist rejection, low-confidence escalation, and conflicting-policy escalation.
Manifest and deployment notes keep runtime strategy as specification-based with explicit promotion criteria for retained implementation.

review_notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguities were left in the research contract coverage.
Boundary handling remained strong across engagement scope, workpaper evidence, confidentiality, quality review, tax and legal authority, partner approval, and final delivery commitment refusal cases.

notes: This pack is designed for validated deployment as a spec-pack and does not claim retained implementation authority.
Promotion to a retained implementation must be explicit and separate.
Functionality coverage is complete in both the evaluation results and the functional audit record.
